productDisplayName: Tantra Kid's Unisex Papa's Joy Green Kidswear
description: CompositionGreen round neck t-shirt in 100% cotton, with chest printFittingComfortWash careMachine wash separately in cold water Use mild detergent Do not bleach Avoid soaking Remove promptly Line dry inside out in shade Warm iron only Do not iron directly on print/embroideryGet the proud father and child duo together onto this tantra t-shirt. With the little one trying to ape the dad, there's no better way to advertise the true love between the two than with this tee. Made of pure cotton, your little one will stay dry and comfortable for long hours in this t-shirt. Pair it with cute crocs footwear and colourful jibbitz for that comfortable touch to the outfit.
